subtitle: Typst Editor with Live Preview
description:
Press is a focused document editor built around Typst, the modern markup language for professional typesetting. Write on the left, see a pixel-perfect PDF preview on the right -- updated in real time as you type.

Live Split-Pane Editing
The split-pane interface shows your Typst source and the rendered PDF side by side. Every keystroke triggers an instant re-render, giving you immediate visual feedback without manual compile steps.

Syntax Highlighting & Smart Editing
Press provides full syntax highlighting for Typst markup, along with bracket matching, auto-indentation, and code folding. The editor is designed to make Typst authoring feel as fluid as writing in a modern code editor.

Templates for Common Documents
Start from built-in templates for letters, reports, academic papers, resumes, and slide decks. Each template is fully editable Typst source, so you can customize every detail to match your needs.

One-Click PDF Export
When your document is ready, export a polished PDF with a single click. Press renders publication-quality output with precise typography, mathematical equations, and vector graphics.

Key Features:
- Real-time split-pane Typst editor and PDF preview
- Full syntax highlighting and smart editing aids
- Built-in document templates for quick starts
- One-click PDF export with professional typesetting
- Lightweight and fast, even with large documents
- Native macOS interface with Dark Mode support
